instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: End-of-term party
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Our class is planning an end-of-term party next Friday. [1]Do you think we should have it in the school hall?[/1]||[2]Can you bring some food for everyone?[/2] We already have drinks, but we need snacks.||[3]What music should we play at the party?[/3] I know you like choosing songs.||[4]Would you like to help me decorate the room after school?[/4]||Let me know||Ben

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Ben,||Thanks for writing. [1]I think having the party in the school hall is a great idea because it’s big enough for everyone and we won’t disturb other classes.[/1]||[2]I can bring some sandwiches and a chocolate cake. My mum said she can help me make them on Thursday evening.[/2]||[3]For the music, we should play some pop songs because most people in our class like them. I can make a playlist.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I can’t help decorate the room after school because I have a dentist appointment.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Anna
